verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I faced a mountain, That I never faced before That's why I'm calling on the Lord I know it's been awhile, But Lord please hear my prayer I need you like I never have before.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes it takes a mountain Sometimes a troubled sea Sometimes it takes a desert To get a hold of me Your Love is so much stronger Then whatever troubles me Sometimes it takes a mountain To trust you and believe

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Forgive me, Jesus I thought I could control Whatever life would throw my way But this I will admit Has brought me to my knees I need you Lord and I'm not ashamed to say

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes it takes a mountain Sometimes a troubled sea Sometimes it takes a desert To get a hold of me Your Love is so much stronger Then whatever troubles me Sometimes it takes a mountain To trust you and believe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Sometimes it takes a mountain To trust you and believe
